title: ASR Outdoor 12 Pack Slow Burning Water Resistant Tinder Sticks
description:
There's nothing like the warmth and light of a campfire after a long day of hiking, camping, swimming, or backpacking. These lightweight tinder sticks can go with you anywhere to ensure you can have that perfect campfire at any time. At just 4 inches long, these compact sticks can go in your pocket or backpack and can be transported with ease. They are water resistant as well, so you don't have to worry about them getting wet or staring a fire when its damp. Tinder sticks come in a value pack of 12. Each stick is slow burning and takes 5 minutes to burn the exterior. Don't forget these next camping trip!
